subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto him who hath believed in God, the Lord of the worlds, that the fragrances of Revelation may draw him unto the station [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب من لدنا الی الذی آمن بالله رب العالمین لتجذبه نفحات الوحی الی مقام
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @humility; meekness; lowliness
